testcase.name: test_register_with_profile_creates_user_and_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: Profile first_name should match assert None == 'John' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89276ec0>('first_name') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89276ec0> = {'documents': [], 'profile': {'accept_part_time': False, 'address': 'Kathmandu, Nepal', 'already_in_romania': False, 'availability': 'immediate', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_candidate_registration.py:143: in test_register_with_profile_creates_user_and_profile assert profile.get("first_name") == "John", "Profile first_name should match" E AssertionError: Profile first_name should match E assert None == 'John' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89276ec0>('first_name') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89276ec0> = {'documents': [], 'profile': {'accept_part_time': False, 'address': 'Kathmandu, Nepal', 'already_in_romania': False, 'availability': 'immediate', ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_candidate_can_access_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: First name should match assert None == 'Access' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89e3d500>('first_name') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89e3d500> = {'documents': [], 'profile': {'accept_part_time': False, 'address': None, 'already_in_romania': False, 'availability': 'immediate', ...}}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_candidate_registration.py:286: in test_candidate_can_access_profile assert profile.get("first_name") == "Access", "First name should match" E AssertionError: First name should match E assert None == 'Access' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89e3d500>('first_name') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdaa89e3d500> = {'documents': [], 'profile': {'accept_part_time': False, 'address': None, 'already_in_romania': False, 'availability': 'immediate', ...}}.get

testcase.name: test_candidate_can_update_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: Profile update failed. Status: 405 assert 405 == 200 + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_candidate_registration.py:322: in test_candidate_can_update_profile assert update_response.status_code == 200, f"Profile update failed. Status: {update_response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Profile update failed. Status: 405 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
